title: Join our Alpha testing for Wand

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re testing something new and we’d love to hear what our community thinks.
Meet Wand - a new way to explore and adopt AI inside monday.
It looks at your boards, understands what you’re working on, and suggests the AI tools that can actually help.
AI that helps you use… AI

It’s currently in alpha, and we’re inviting you to get early access and share feedback before it rolls out more broadly.

If you’d like to join, sign up here.
